# GPBS provenance

- Upstream: https://github.com/shchan13/GPBS
- Pinned commit: `43f2a6fea50893871219b674535f83920175ae04`
- Retrieved: 2026-07-14
- Local build target: `gpbs_official`

The `inc/` and `src/` trees, upstream `README.md`, `CMakeLists.txt`, and
`license.md` are copied from the pinned commit. The root project builds GPBS as
an independent end-to-end feasibility solver. It is not an MAPF-LNS2 destroy
heuristic and does not share the LNS2 repair-policy interface.

GPBS is distributed under the USC Research License in `license.md`. Commercial
use requires separate permission from the copyright owner.
